title: Provider
description: A healthcare provider record in providers_staging / providers_enriched. Source: NPPES NPI Registry (CMS). Enriched by the FindCare DataPipelines county enrichment job. Draft 07 — the most contemporary JSON Schema version supported by MongoDB $jsonSchema validators. To use as a MongoDB collection validator, replace 'type' with 'bsonType' throughout (e.g. 'type: string' → 'bsonType: string', 'type: integer' → 'bsonType: int' or 'bsonType: long'). NOTE: All entity-type-specific fields (individual vs. organization) are declared in top-level 'properties' so that additionalProperties: false can evaluate them. The if/then/else block enforces which fields are *required* per entity type — it does not restrict which fields are *allowed*.

_id.description: MongoDB ObjectId — auto-assigned on insert. Omit on write; always present on read.

npi.description: National Provider Identifier — 10-digit string, globally unique, issued by CMS. Never numeric; leading zeros are significant.

entity_type_code.description: NPI entity type. '1' = individual practitioner. '2' = organization (hospital, pharmacy, group practice, etc.).

provider_enumeration_date.description: Date the NPI was issued by CMS. Format: MM/DD/YYYY (as received from NPPES CSV; not converted to ISO 8601).

last_update_date.description: Date the NPI record was last updated in the NPPES registry. Format: MM/DD/YYYY.

certification_date.description: Date the provider last certified their NPI record with CMS. Format: MM/DD/YYYY.

npi_deactivation_date.description: Date the NPI was deactivated. Present only if the provider has been deactivated. Format: MM/DD/YYYY. If present without npi_reactivation_date, the provider is inactive and flagged as out_of_scope.

npi_reactivation_date.description: Date the NPI was reactivated after a prior deactivation. Present only if the provider was deactivated and then reactivated. Format: MM/DD/YYYY.

practice_address.description: Primary practice location address. Absent for providers with no listed practice address (these are flagged as out_of_scope with reason 'no_address').

mailing_address.description: Mailing/billing address. May differ from practice_address. Used as fallback geocoding input in Pass 3 (billing retry). Optional — not all providers report a separate mailing address.

taxonomies.description: Provider specialty taxonomy codes (NUCC Health Care Provider Taxonomy). At least one entry is typical; multiple entries represent additional specialties. Exactly one entry should have primary: true.

primary.description: True if this is the provider's primary specialty.

licenses.description: Professional licenses held by the provider. Each entry is a state/number pair from the NPPES data. May be empty for some records.

state.description: US state abbreviation where the license was issued.

number.description: License number as reported by the provider to CMS.

other_identifiers.description: Legacy or alternate provider identifiers (e.g. UPIN, Medicaid, Medicare OSCAR). Parallel array with other_identifier_types and other_identifier_states.

other_identifier_types.description: Type codes for other_identifiers. Common values: '01' = Other, '04' = Medicare UPIN, '05' = Medicaid.

other_identifier_states.description: State associated with each entry in other_identifiers. May be shorter than other_identifiers if trailing entries have no state.

other_identifier_issuers.description: Issuing organization for each entry in other_identifiers (e.g. 'PK' for a payer). Sparse — length may be less than other_identifiers.

county.description: County enrichment result. Always present after the load job completes. See county definition for source and reason enum values.

load_id.description: Pipeline run identifier that wrote this record. Format: '<uuid>:<worker_num>' — allows tracing any record back to the exact pipeline run and worker that produced it.

record_id.description: Sequential integer assigned by the load worker. Unique within a single pipeline run but NOT globally unique across runs — use npi as the stable identifier.

worker_id.description: Index of the pipeline worker that loaded this record (0-based). Used for debugging load distribution.

provider_last_name_legal_name.description: Provider's legal last name as registered with CMS. Required when entity_type_code = '1' (individual).

provider_first_name.description: Provider's first name. Required when entity_type_code = '1' (individual).

provider_middle_name.description: Provider's middle name or initial. Optional. Only present on individual records (entity_type_code = '1').

provider_name_prefix_text.description: Name prefix (e.g. 'Dr.', 'Mr.'). Optional. Only present on individual records.

provider_name_suffix_text.description: Name suffix (e.g. 'Jr.', 'III'). Optional. Only present on individual records.

provider_credential_text.description: Professional credential suffix (e.g. 'M.D.', 'D.O.', 'R.N.'). Optional. Only present on individual records.

provider_sex_code.description: Provider sex as reported to CMS. Optional — not required by NPPES. Only present on individual records.

is_sole_proprietor.description: Whether the individual provider operates as a sole proprietor ('Y'/'N'). Only present on individual records (entity_type_code = '1').

provider_organization_name_legal_busines.description: Legal business name of the organization. Required when entity_type_code = '2' (organization).

provider_other_organization_name.description: Alternate or DBA name for the organization. May be '<UNAVAIL>' if not provided. Only present on organization records.

provider_other_organization_name_type_co.description: Type code for provider_other_organization_name. '3' = Former name, '4' = Professional name, '5' = Doing Business As, '6' = Former legal business name. Only present on organization records.

employer_identification_number_ein.description: Federal EIN for the organization. May be '<UNAVAIL>' if CMS was unable to obtain it. Only present on organization records.

is_organization_subpart.description: Whether this organization is a subpart of a larger organization ('Y'/'N'). Only present on organization records.

parent_organization_lbn.description: Legal business name of the parent organization. Present only if is_organization_subpart = 'Y'.

parent_organization_tin.description: Tax Identification Number of the parent organization. Present only if is_organization_subpart = 'Y'.

authorized_official_last_name.description: Last name of the authorized official responsible for the NPI record. Only present on organization records.

authorized_official_first_name.description: First name of the authorized official. Only present on organization records.

authorized_official_middle_name.description: Middle name of the authorized official. Optional. Only present on organization records.

authorized_official_title_or_position.description: Job title or position of the authorized official. Only present on organization records.

authorized_official_telephone_number.description: Phone number of the authorized official. Digits only, no formatting. Only present on organization records.

authorized_official_credential_text.description: Professional credential of the authorized official. Optional. Only present on organization records.

then.description: Individual provider (entity_type_code = '1'): last name and first name are required.

else.description: Organization (entity_type_code = '2'): legal business name is required.

address.title: Address
address.description: A US mailing or practice address as reported in the NPPES NPI registry.

line2.description: Street address line 2 (suite, floor, etc.). Optional.

state.description: Two-letter US state or territory abbreviation.

zip.description: ZIP code. May be 5-digit ('30024') or ZIP+4 ('30024-1234'). Always stored as a string to preserve leading zeros.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. 'US' for domestic providers. Foreign values trigger out_of_scope with reason 'foreign_provider'.

phone.description: Phone number. Digits only, no formatting. Optional.

fax.description: Fax number. Digits only, no formatting. Optional.

county.title: CountyEnrichment
county.description: Result of the county enrichment pipeline for this provider. Always written; fips is null when enrichment failed or provider is out of scope.

fips.description: 5-digit FIPS county code (2-digit state + 3-digit county). Null when enrichment failed (geocoder_failed) or provider is excluded (out_of_scope). Example: '30063' = Missoula County, MT.

name.description: Human-readable county name (e.g. 'Missoula County'). Present when fips is set via crosswalk or Maps. Absent for geocoder_pass2_batch and geocoder_pass3_billing (Census geocoder does not return county name).

source.description: Which enrichment pass assigned the county. Determines the reliability and method of the county assignment.

x-enum-descriptions.crosswalk_pass1: ZIP → county via ZipCountyCrosswalk (res_ratio >= 0.98). Fastest, ~82% of all providers.
x-enum-descriptions.crosswalk_zip_fixed: ZIP crosswalk applied after zip_state_mismatch detection corrected the state.
x-enum-descriptions.geocoder_pass2_batch: US Census Geocoder batch API using practice address. ~10% of providers.
x-enum-descriptions.geocoder_pass3_billing: US Census Geocoder batch API using mailing/billing address (fallback for Pass 2 failures).
x-enum-descriptions.geocoder_pass4_maps: Google Maps Geocoding API using practice address. Paid API — requires google_maps_enabled=true.
x-enum-descriptions.geocoder_pass5_maps_billing: Google Maps Geocoding API using billing address. Paid API.
x-enum-descriptions.geocoder_pass6_nppes: NPI looked up in NPPES registry; returned address tried against ZIP crosswalk. Rarely improves on NPI data since NPPES is the same source.
x-enum-descriptions.geocoder_failed: All enrichment passes exhausted with no result. Provider has a US address that could not be geocoded.
x-enum-descriptions.out_of_scope: Provider excluded from enrichment. See 'reason' field for the specific exclusion criterion.

reason.description: Exclusion reason. Present only when source = 'out_of_scope'.

x-enum-descriptions.no_address: Provider has neither practice_address nor mailing_address.
x-enum-descriptions.deactivated: npi_deactivation_date is set and npi_reactivation_date is absent — NPI is inactive.
x-enum-descriptions.zip_state_mismatch: practice_address.zip maps to a different state in the ZipCountyCrosswalk than practice_address.state indicates. Address is internally inconsistent.
x-enum-descriptions.legacy: Marked out_of_scope before the reason field was introduced (pre-migration records). Exact reason unknown.

zip_ratio.description: Residential ratio of the ZIP code used for crosswalk assignment (0.0 – 1.0). Present only when source = 'crosswalk_pass1'. Values >= 0.98 indicate the ZIP is dominated by a single county. Lower values indicate a split ZIP, which uses the Census Geocoder instead.
